runners.formComment: Placed last time (19.28) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 5.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looks a leading chance.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was an eye-catching winner scoring by a neck in a Grade 4/5 at this track and clocking a brilliant 25.68 for the 457m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.
